title: Hast Never Come To Thee An Hour
content:
Hast never come to thee an hour,
A sudden gleam divine, precipitating, bursting all these bubbles, fashions, wealth?
These eager business aims--books, politics, art, amours,
To utter nothingness?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walt Whitman delivers a powerful performance in "Hast Never Come To Thee An Hour"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
